prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref: The image features an assortment of green apples arranged on top of a white plate or bowl. There are at least nine distinct apples displayed in various positions around the dish. Some apples can be seen closer to the front edge of the plate while others are positioned more towards the back. Overall, it is a visually appealing arrangement that showcases the vibrant color of these fresh fruits.
